chk_external_must_have_reference.name: chk_external_must_have_reference
chk_external_must_have_reference.value: "external_identities"."user_id" IS NOT NULL OR "external_identities"."enrollment_id" IS NOT NULL

chk_workout_days_per_week.name: chk_workout_days_per_week
chk_workout_days_per_week.value: "workout_templates"."minimum_days_per_week" IS NULL OR "workout_templates"."maximum_days_per_week" IS NULL OR "workout_templates"."minimum_days_per_week" <= "workout_templates"."maximum_days_per_week"

chk_reps_min_max.name: chk_reps_min_max
chk_reps_min_max.value: "workout_template_exercises"."reps_min" IS NULL OR "workout_template_exercises"."reps_max" IS NULL OR "workout_template_exercises"."reps_min" <= "workout_template_exercises"."reps_max"
